title: Chapter 29 Summary
main_description: The chapter develops the Syrup Village arc, where Usopp’s lies, Kaya’s sheltered life, and Kuro’s hidden plan collide with the Straw Hats’ arrival. The story gradually turns Usopp’s fantasy of being a brave pirate into a real test of courage.
key_events: Usopp and the Straw Hats become tied to Kaya and the village.
Kuro and Jango’s plan threatens Kaya and Syrup Village.
The conflict pushes Usopp toward proving his courage for real.
